parameters.body: ={"api_key": "B0qwKmMAtpBBHBCd5AIfA", "person_titles": ["VP Regulatory Affairs", "Director Regulatory Affairs", "VP Quality Assurance", "VP Clinical Operations"], "organization_locations": ["United States", "Canada"], "organization_num_employees_ranges": ["11-50", "51-200", "201-500"], "contact_email_status": ["verified"], "page": 1, "per_page": 25}

parameters.jsCode:
// Parse Apollo results and format for Google Sheets
const people = $json.people || [];
return people.map((person, index) => {
  return {
    json: {
      'Lead ID': 'AUTO-' + (1000 + index),
      'Team Member': 'Catriona',
      'Campaign': 'QMSR',
      'Status': 'Pending',
      'First Name': person.first_name || '',
      'Last Name': person.last_name || '',
      'Email': person.email || '',
      'Company': person.organization?.name || '',
      'Title': person.title || '',
      'Industry': 'Medical Devices',
      'Company Size': person.organization?.estimated_num_employees || '',
      'Location': (person.city || '') + ', ' + (person.state || ''),
      'Company Website': person.organization?.website_url || '',
      'LinkedIn URL': person.linkedin_url || '',
      'Enrichment Status': 'Pending',
      'Personalization Hook': '',
      'Personalized Opening Line': '',
      'Email 1 Status': '',
      'Email 1 Date': '',
      'Email 2 Status': '',
      'Email 2 Date': '',
      'Email 3 Status': '',
      'Email 3 Date': '',
      'Response Status': '',
      'Response Date': '',
      'Response Category': '',
      'Meeting Status': '',
      'Meeting Date': '',
      'Meeting Notes': '',
      'Owner (Avania)': '',
      'Created Date': new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
      'Last Updated': new Date().toISOString(),
      'Notes': ''
    }
  };
});

messages.content: You are an expert B2B sales personalization assistant for Avania Clinical, a medical device CRO company. Generate a personalized opening line for cold emails that is 1-2 sentences, references the company/person, and naturally leads into QMSR compliance or quality services.
